content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!

options.text: You're welcome! Call if you have more questions.
I don't know, ask someone else.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'You're welcome! Call if you have more questions.'，这是对感谢的礼貌且专业的回应。选项2、3、4都显得粗鲁、不尊重或不专业，不符合礼貌道别的场景要求。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate all your guidance!
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你的所有指导！

options.text: No problem! Take care and good luck!
Why are you thanking me? I didn't do much.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem! Take care and good luck!' 既礼貌又温暖，符合道别场景。选项2虽然语法正确，但语气过于轻描淡写，可能削弱对方的感激之情。选项3和4显得冷漠或不耐烦，不符合礼貌道别的语境。

content.speakerText: Thank you for answering all my questions!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你回答了我所有的问题！

options.text: It was my pleasure. Have a wonderful day!
You're welcome. Now leave me alone.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was my pleasure. Have a wonderful day!' 是正式而温暖的回应，适合礼貌道别。选项2太随意，选项3和4带有负面情绪，破坏了友好氛围。

content.template: Thanks so much! ___ you for your help!
content.hint: 这是表达感谢的完整句型，注意动词形式

content.template: I really appreciate your time. ___ you and have a great day!
content.hint: 这是道别时常用的祝福句型
content.knowledgePoint: 道别固定搭配：Have a good/day/wonderful day

content.template: Thanks for everything! I'll ___ you if I need more help.
content.hint: 这是服务场景中常见的后续联系方式表达
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频动词搭配：call if you have questions

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Don't hesitate to call if you need anything.
No problem at all! Have a wonderful day!
My pleasure! Feel free to reach out anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢并表达了支持意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气友好
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'you're welcome', 'call', 'have a good day' 等场景关键词

expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure! Wishing you all the best with your studies.
Thank you for saying that! Let me know if you need anything else.
I'm glad I could help! Take care and good luck!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢并保持开放支持态度
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词和祝福语，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气温暖、真诚，符合服务人员身份
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'my pleasure', 'let me know', 'take care', 'good luck' 等地道表达

content.speakerText: Thank you for answering all my questions!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你回答了我所有的问题！
expectedAnswers: You're very welcome! I'm here if you need more help.
Happy to help! Have a great day ahead!
No worries at all! Feel free to reach out anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应感谢并提供后续支持可能性
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了正确的短语和介词搭配
表达自然度：语调友好，符合日常英语交流习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'you're welcome', 'feel free', 'reach out', 'have a great day' 等核心表达
